title: Public `init()` allows hostile first-initialization of any orphaned clone
reason: `init()` is public on clones, but the repo shows no in-protocol deployment path that leaves a legitimate clone uninitialized; BentoBox-style master-contract deployments normally initialize atomically. This is too contingent on an external deployment mistake to treat as a reportable protocol issue here.

title: Batch liquidation rounds down each account's debt separately and can strand residual bad debt
reason: The rounding loss is bounded to less than one smallest debt unit per liquidated account, making the aggregate effect dust-only and not a realistic protocol-level harm.
